entries.recipe_text: One peck of green tomatoes. Six peppers, taking out the seeds. Three onions. Chop together and cover them over night, adding two-thirds of a cup of salt. In the morning, draw off the liquor and just cover with vinegar. add one and a half cups of sugar. Less than a cup of made mustard. A table-spoon of cloves, allspice and cinnamon. Boil all about twenty minutes or more. Much improved by the addition of cauliflower and celery, with the other things.
ingredients: Two-thirds of a cup of salt
One and a half cups of sugar
Less than a cup of made mustard
steps: Chop the tomatoes, peppers, and onions together.
Cover the mixture over night, adding two-thirds of a cup of salt.
In the morning, draw off the liquor.
Add sugar, made mustard, cloves, allspice, and cinnamon.
Boil all about twenty minutes or more.
Add cauliflower and celery if desired.
